title: Memeified
description: Plays meme sounds when you do things!
body:
# Plays meme sounds when you do things!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KyLyroXA/images/7178fdcfb622f01569f5bcd43342e29042a9f02c.png)

# Adds a meme sound for:
- Walking
- Jumping
- Sleeping
- Dying

**These features can be customized using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). _(Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config))_**

_If you don't have either of the required mods for configuration, you can check inside the _```config```_ folder in your minecraft files for _```Memeified.json```_ and configure the mod's settings from there._
